creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
svnlite --version shows that no RA modules are available.

svn v 1.10.0 (r1827917)

I figured out the problem after installing from 
FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20180503-r333209-disc1.iso

svnlite co svn:/... /usr/src

updated me to rev 333382

compiled&installed kernel & world

And the next try to `svnlite up` failed to 

svn: E170000: Unrecognized URL scheme
